response.justification: Bogdan brings 13+ years of broad full-stack and high-throughput backend experience (notably millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby) and covers most required languages, satisfying the years-of-experience and engineering-fundamentals bar. However, the role is a Principal/IC6 position centered specifically on experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, and statistical analysis — none of which appear in the resume. There is also limited evidence of org-spanning, principal-level architectural leadership or the data-science/experimental-analysis aptitude the role weights heavily. A strong senior generalist, but a partial fit for this specialized growth/experimentation mandate.
strengths: 13+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices (millions of req/s)
Covers most required languages: C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript
Strong software-craftsmanship signal: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, mentoring, public talks
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or rollout-risk experience
Lacks data-science/statistical-analysis and telemetry-platform background the role centers on
Title and scope are Senior/Staff IC; little evidence of Principal-level cross-org architectural leadership

key_factors.factor: Years of experience and language breadth
